evals.prompt: I'm starting to write the paper for project Collab-IEM-NanoplasticZeolites. Set up the manuscript file. Target journal: Environmental Science & Technology. Title: 'Selective adsorption of nanoplastic polymer fragments in zeolite MFI: a DFT+GCMC study'. Key claims: (1) MFI adsorbs PE more strongly than PP by ~26 kJ/mol, (2) PE:PP selectivity = 2.0 at 0.1 bar, (3) dispersion dominates over electrostatics, (4) practical uptake capacity ~4.2 molecules/uc. Anticipated reviewer concerns: all-silica model misses Al-site effects; TraPPE-UA may not transfer to oxidised fragments.
evals.expected_output: manuscript-context.md created with all sections populated: journal named, title set, claims listed as bullets, methods table pre-populated from methods.md (CASTEP PBE-D3 830 eV, RASPA2 GCMC, Zeo++), key results pre-populated from results-log.md (adsorption energies, loading numbers), known weaknesses listed, open questions included.

assertions.description: manuscript-context.md contains 'Environmental Science & Technology' in the Target journal section
manuscript-context.md contains a markdown table with CASTEP, RASPA2, and Zeo++ rows pre-populated from methods.md
manuscript-context.md contains numerical results from results-log.md (e.g. 4.2 molecules/uc or -61.4 kJ/mol or selectivity 2.0)
manuscript-context.md has a Key claims section with at least 3 bullet points
manuscript-context.md lists anticipated reviewer concerns including Al substitution and/or TraPPE-UA transferability

evals.prompt: Update the manuscript context for project Collab-IEM-NanoplasticZeolites. Add a new anticipated reviewer concern: the study uses a rigid zeolite framework, but framework flexibility may affect diffusion of polymer fragments at narrow pore windows.
evals.expected_output: manuscript-context.md updated: the new reviewer concern about rigid framework / framework flexibility is appended to the Known weaknesses section. All other sections (journal, title, claims, methods, results, open questions) remain unchanged.

assertions.description: manuscript-context.md now contains 'rigid' or 'framework flexibility' or 'diffusion' in the Known weaknesses section
manuscript-context.md still contains the original concerns about Al substitution and TraPPE-UA
Target journal, Working title, Key claims, and Computational methods sections are unchanged from the fixture
